norwegian: Det er det ___ hotellet i byen.
english: It is the best hotel in the city.

norwegian: Han er den ___ gutten i klassen.
english: He is the tallest boy in the class.

norwegian: Dette er den ___ veien til sentrum.
english: This is the shortest way to the city centre.

norwegian: Det er det ___ været vi har hatt på lenge.
english: It is the worst weather we have had in a long time.

norwegian: Everest er det høyeste fjellet i verden.
english: Everest is the highest mountain in the world.

norwegian: Hun er den beste eleven i skolen.
english: She is the best pupil in the school.

norwegian: Dette er den lengste dagen i året.
english: This is the longest day of the year.

norwegian: Flest studenter foretrekker å studere om morgenen.
english: Most students prefer to study in the morning.

norwegian: Den minste leiligheten i bygget er likevel den dyreste.
english: The smallest apartment in the building is nonetheless the most expensive.

norwegian: Boken er mest interessant
english: The book is the most interesting

norwegian: Forfatteren skriver den mest populære boka
english: The author writes the most popular book

norwegian: Biblioteket har flest bøker
english: The library has the most books

norwegian: Romanen er den beste
english: The novel is the best

norwegian: Hun er den vakreste
english: She is the most beautiful

norwegian: Jeg har det største huset
english: I have the largest house

norwegian: Vannet er det varmeste i elven
english: The water is the warmest in the river

norwegian: Boken er den lengste på hyllen
english: The book is the longest on the shelf

norwegian: Huset er det høyeste i nabolaget
english: The house is the highest in the neighborhood

norwegian: Huset er det største
english: The house is the biggest

norwegian: Boken er den lengste
english: The book is the longest

norwegian: Jeg har den største
english: I have the biggest

norwegian: Vi har den mest komfortable
english: We have the most comfortable

norwegian: De er de raskeste
english: They are the fastest

norwegian: Dette er det største huset i gaten.
english: This is the biggest house on the street.

norwegian: Hun er den flinkeste i klassen.
english: She is the most skilled in the class.

norwegian: Galdhøpiggen er det høyeste fjellet i Norge.
english: Galdhøpiggen is the highest mountain in Norway.

norwegian: Denne boken er den beste jeg har lest.
english: This book is the best I have read.

norwegian: Han er den yngste i familien.
english: He is the youngest in the family.

norwegian: Sommeren er den varmeste årstiden.
english: Summer is the warmest season.

norwegian: Det var den verste dagen i mitt liv.
english: It was the worst day of my life.

norwegian: Hvem er sterkest av dere?
english: Who is the strongest of you?

norwegian: Dette er den minste byen i landet.
english: This is the smallest town in the country.
